ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., hardware, software) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the device */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of device installation */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device function */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the function belongs to */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function (e.g., changeSetpoint, configure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the function */,
  "function_category" TEXT /* Category of the function (e.g., control, monitoring) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_functions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_capabilities" (
  "capability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device capability */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the capability belongs to */,
  "capability_name" TEXT /* Name of the capability (e.g., temperature range, accuracy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the capability */,
  "capability_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the capability (e.g., Celsius, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_capabilities_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constraint_info" (
  "constraint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device constraint */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the constraint belongs to */,
  "constraint_name" TEXT /* Name of the constraint (e.g., maximum temperature, minimum voltage) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the constraint */,
  "constraint_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the constraint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constraint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constraint_info_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "setpoints" (
  "setpoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device setpoint */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the setpoint belongs to */,
  "setpoint_name" TEXT /* Name of the setpoint (e.g., temperature setpoint, pressure setpoint) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the setpoint */,
  "setpoint_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the setpoint (e.g., Celsius, bar) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_setpoints_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device status */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the status belongs to */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., online, offline, error) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the status */,
  "status_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_status_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_software" (
  "software_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device software */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the software belongs to */,
  "software_name" TEXT /* Name of the software */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the software */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the software was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("software_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_software_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device documentation */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the documentation belongs to */,
  "doc_name" TEXT /* Name of the documentation (e.g., user manual, datasheet) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the documentation */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of documentation (e.g., PDF, HTML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_documentation_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, engineer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the device */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device change */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the change belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., software update, configuration change) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_history_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device alert */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the alert belongs to */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert occurred */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., error, warning) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., critical, informational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_alerts_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device tag */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_value" TEXT /* Value of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_tags_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device metadata */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_metadata_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
